_comment: SAVEMAP_CONFIG button-remap table (init.out/save offsets 0x08-0x13). Each physical button slot stores the id of the logical action it triggers (config value = action bit + 1; default = its own slot + 1; 0 = unassigned). Action names/behaviours identified from IDA (sub_4A2D60 remap core and its consumers). Bits 2, 9, 10 could not be resolved from static analysis.

action.name: Unassigned
action.note: Physical button triggers no logical action

action.name: Flee (hold)
action.note: Held together with the other Flee action = attempt to flee battle

action.name: Flee (hold)
action.note: Held together with the other Flee action = attempt to flee battle

action.name: Menu page / prev character
action.note: Page-left / previous character in menus (default L1)

action.name: Renzokuken / next character
action.note: Renzokuken critical-timing press in battle; next character in menus (default R1)

action.name: Confirm / Talk
action.note: Confirm in menus; talk/examine (primary) in the field

action.name: Reset controls
action.note: Resets the button config to default (Controls submenu only)

action.name: Unused (phantom slot)
action.note: Filler config slot — no physical button maps here and no code consumes it

action.name: Unused (phantom slot)
action.note: Filler config slot — no physical button maps here and no code consumes it

action.name: Pause / Start
action.note: Pause / system menu (Start is read from the physical button, bypassing remap)
